level_signals: 5+ years in product management leading scaled conversational AI products
Comp range $385K-$460K base, consistent with Senior IC at Anthropic
Expected to operate with autonomy across Research, Product, and Safeguards teams

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Have a deep passion and curiosity for AI and LLMs. Use AI regularly.
Have 5+ years in product management leading scaled conversational AI products.

Are a first-principles thinker with the ability to navigate and execute amidst ambiguity, flexing into different domains based on the business problem at hand and finding simple, easy-to-understand solutions
Have a track record of delivering products and features to end-users (consumer or end-user b2b focus)
Have strong user empathy and the ability to synthesize vague or contradictory feedback into actionable priorities
Have strong judgment and model taste, with the ability to make tradeoffs when there is no clear right answer
Have a strong grasp of ML concepts and are willing to go deep on technical solutions
Have intellectual curiosity without ego—comfortable asking questions and learning independently
Think creatively about the risks and benefits of new technologies, moving beyond past checklists and playbooks
Have a creative, hacker spirit and love solving puzzles
Bachelor's degree or an equivalent combination of education, training, and/or experience

scope.surface: Claude's character, behaviors, and reinforcement signals; Alignment Finetuning team partnership
primary_metrics_inferred: Volume and quality of behavioral improvements shipped
Speed of alignment research translation to product
core_responsibilities: Define behavioral defaults and steerability constraints
Develop and maintain taxonomies of model behaviors across capabilities
Identify, triage, and prioritize behavior issues and opportunities, coordinating input from Users, Research, Product, and Safeguards teams
Amplify alignment research breakthroughs, translating them into product, process, and model improvements
Deeply understand user interaction patterns to identify behavior improvements that make Claude more helpful and safe
Contribute to evals that measure alignment progress
Identify and scale initiatives and tools that help researchers ship alignment improvements faster

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed and highly competitive ($385K-$460K base)
Visa sponsorship explicitly offered with immigration lawyer retained
Clear product surface with direct mission impact (shaping Claude's behaviors for millions of users)
Encourages applications from candidates who don't meet every qualification
Explicit commitment to diversity and representation
Hybrid policy stated clearly (25% in-office minimum)
red_flags: Hybrid policy requires at least 25% office time in San Francisco — eliminates fully-remote candidates
'Hacker spirit' and 'creative' cultural fit requirements are hard to assess objectively and may introduce subjectivity in hiring
5+ years specifically in scaled conversational AI products is a narrow and hard-to-substitute requirement
Role sits at intersection of research and product — scope could expand significantly depending on team structure

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from comp range + years required)
location.cities_listed (inferred as San Francisco from HQ reference; role-specific city not explicitly named)
ambiguities: The JD lists all requirements under 'Minimum Qualifications' including the hacker spirit / creative cultural fit items, making them technically hard requirements; however, cultural fit items are often soft in practice. Treated as hard per schema rules but flagged here.
Nice-to-haves section is entirely absent from the JD; no explicit preferred/bonus qualifications listed.
Required field of study is stated as 'A field relevant to the role as demonstrated through coursework, training, or professional experience' — highly ambiguous and effectively open.
